differential_diagnoses: Infective endocarditis (Staphylococcus aureus or HACEK organisms) with septic emboli
Systemic necrotizing vasculitis (e.g., Polyarteritis nodosa or GPA)
next_steps: Perform urgent transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to assess for vegetations
Send comprehensive antiphospholipid antibody panel (Lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, anti-beta-2-glycoprotein I)
Order autoimmune serology panel including ANCA, anti-dsDNA, and C3/C4 complement levels
Carefully review peripheral blood smear for schistocytes and markers of microangiopathic hemolytic anemia
Consult infectious disease for specialized blood cultures and evaluation of fastidious pathogens
Avoid therapeutic anticoagulation until the risk of intracranial hemorrhage is fully characterized and weighed against thrombotic risk
